terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: This site is operated by its owner. By using the site, you agree to these terms.

sections.heading: Accounts
sections.body: If you create an account, you are responsible for keeping your credentials secure. Accounts may be suspended or removed for violations of these terms.

sections.heading: Content and Ownership
sections.body: All site content, code, and branding are owned by the site operator. No license is granted to copy, modify, or distribute any part of the site without express written permission.

sections.heading: Acceptable Use
sections.body: Do not attempt to access restricted areas without authorization, scrape the site, or use the site for unlawful, abusive, or disruptive activity.

sections.heading: Availability
sections.body: The site is provided "as is" and may change or be unavailable at any time.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: We collect the information you provide when creating an account, submitting forms, or uploading content. We use it to operate the site and communicate with you.

sections.heading: What we collect
items: Content you submit (posts, tasks, media, etc.)
Basic usage data necessary to run the site

sections.heading: How we use it
items: Provide access to your data and features

sections.heading: What we do not do
items: Sell your personal data to third parties

sections.heading: Service providers
sections.body: We may use third-party hosting and storage providers to run the site. They only receive the data needed to provide those services.

sections.heading: Cookies
sections.body: We use cookies and local storage for essential site functionality, such as session management and preferences.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.intro: We want this site to be usable by as many people as possible.

sections.heading: Our approach
sections.body: We aim to follow common accessibility practices and improve the site over time.

sections.heading: Known limitations
sections.body: Some pages or features may not fully meet accessibility needs yet.

sections.heading: Feedback
sections.body: If you encounter barriers or have suggestions, contact the site owner so we can improve.
